CHARACTER REFERENCES:
- [IMAGE 1]: Match IMAGE 1 — face, hair, skin tone, clothing, art style.
- [IMAGE 2]: Match IMAGE 2 — face, age, outfit, art style.

STYLE:
undefined
Warm color palette — consistent with IMAGE 1's art style.
Painterly brushwork, soft linework — consistent with IMAGE 1.
Flat 2D illustrated rendering. Stylized lighting only. No photographic shadows or lens effects.

SCENE:
- Setting: Bedroom (Indoor)
- Time of Day: Morning
- Mood: Dreamy
- Action: Sarah gazing out the window with a dreamy expression.

COMPOSITION:
- [IMAGE 1] and [IMAGE 2] occupy the left two-thirds of the frame, angled slightly inward toward each other.
- The right side is open, uncluttered background for text overlay.
- Framing: Wide establishing shot, Wide Establishing Shot. No dutch angles.

--no text, watermarks, photorealistic lighting
